overview:
BEWebContentFilter  allow(_:completionHandler:) Instance Methodallow(_:completionHandler:)iOS 26.2+iPadOS 26.2+func allow(
    _ url: URL,
    completionHandler: @escaping @Sendable (Bool, (any Error)?) -> Void
)func allow(_ url: URL) async throws -> Bool Parameters urlThe URL to be added.

The completion block to be called when the add operation is complete, with result of the operation. Result is YES if the url is added successfully, and NO if it isn’t.

Adds blocked URL to built-in web content filter’s allowlist.

# allow(_:completionHandler:) | Apple Developer Documentation

-  allow(_:completionHandler:) 

Instance Method# allow(_:completionHandler:)

iOS 26.2+iPadOS 26.2+

```
func allow(
    _ url: URL,
    completionHandler: @escaping @Sendable (Bool, (any Error)?) -> Void
)
```



```
func allow(_ url: URL) async throws -> Bool
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEWebContentFilter/allow(_:completionHandler:)#parameters)

`url`The URL to be added.

`completionHandler`The completion block to be called when the add operation is complete, with result of the operation. Result is YES if the url is added successfully, and NO if it isn’t.

## [Discussion](/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEWebContentFilter/allow(_:completionHandler:)#discussion)

Adds blocked URL to built-in web content filter’s allowlist.
